summary_en: 積水樹脂 published a cost-of-capital / capital-efficiency disclosure (update). Signals management is engaging with the Principle-6 framework.
summary_jp: 積水樹脂が資本コスト・株価を意識した経営に関する開示（更新）。資本効率を踏まえた経営方針への対応。

summary_en: 積水樹脂 authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 積水樹脂が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: 積水樹脂 cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: 積水樹脂が自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。
